from pathlib import Path
import shutil
reqs = [
    (1, 'secret_file.txt extracted from /app/secrets.7z', Path('/app/extracted/secrets/secret_file.txt').exists()),
    (2, '/app/solution.txt exists', Path('/app/solution.txt').exists()),
    (3, '/app/solution.txt exactly matches secret', Path('/app/solution.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == Path('/app/extracted/secrets/secret_file.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8')),
]
for n, label, ok in reqs:
    print(f'{n}. {label}: {"verified" if ok else "failed"}')
print('solution_repr=', repr(Path('/app/solution.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8')))
print('secret_bytes=')
print(Path('/app/extracted/secrets/secret_file.txt').read_bytes())
PY
rm -f /app/hash.txt && rm -rf /app/extracted && test ! -e /app/hash.txt && test ! -e /app/extracted && ls -l /app/solution.txt
